{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,

    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies and addresses a critical inconsistency in the original text, proposing a minimal repair to align the thesis with the evidence.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring that each result is accurately represented.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Whisper) and articulates the delta between SonicNet and Whisper-medium, demonstrating a basic understanding of the relevant literature.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'a meaningful contribution'), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no provenance and traceability annotation).",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not provide every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, blending sources without traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}
